title: Fit test - both earbuds are disconnected, not possible to start the Fit test [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit Test button remains disabled when both earbuds are disconnected from the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with both earbuds disconnected from the app.
2. Navigate to Fit test (located under Tutorials, Onboarding, or User Guides).
3. Attempt to start the Fit test by tapping the Test button.
expected: The Test button should be disabled, preventing the user from starting the Fit test when both earbuds are not connected to the app.
